name: OpenClaw Devboxes
description: Spin up full development environments from agent chat — VSCode, VNC desktop, and Chrome DevTools Protocol (CDP) devboxes with full lifecycle management.
review: Excellent architecture with genuine innovation — VSCode + VNC + CDP devboxes controllable from agent chat. Missing SKILL.md frontmatter fields and security disclosure for docker socket mount. Highly useful and unique.
notes: Docker socket mount required (chmod 666). Pin docker image tags to digest for production use. Credentials passed as env vars — review security posture before deploying.
